examples: Megasporogenesis and Female Gametogenesis: Archesporium is of one cell, it directly functions as macrospore mother cell.
The megasporogenesis and microsporogenesis and the development of their female and male gametophyte are partially abnormal.
The megasporogenesis, microsporogenesis, female and male gametophyte development, development of embryo and endosperm were observed by using paraffin wax.
